Customer Support Contact: ☎ 613-727-0727 ✉ info@granatamusic.com

Careers

Are you looking to join a dynamic, ever changing and all around awesome team of music lovers? We're always looking for additions to our staff, so check here often to see official job postings. Don't see anything? Send us your resume and a little blurb with how you'd fit in to our team and we'll give you a shout if we like what we see!

Postings:
Music Teacher (Voice and Piano):

If you are a passionate and energetic music teacher who loves helping others to learn and grow in their love of music, this is the position for you! Our goal is to offer every student a vibrant and stimulating learning experience to help them reach their potential. 

ADVANTAGES:

Contract basis with commission on store sales
Free coffee or tea as you desire
Teacher discounts for your own purchases
Fully computerized scheduling with internet available in the classroom
We take care of all scheduling and payments so all you need to focus on is your relationship with your students!

QUALIFICATIONS:

Must be available for 1-3 weekday shifts
Minimum Grade 8 Vocal and Piano Experience with appropriate theory
Experience an asset, especially working with children
Bilingualism is a definite plus

AVAILABILITY:

Weekdays (Afternoons & Evenings)
Weekend Availability is a plus

Message us on Insta
